heading: Abolition of United States Arms Control and Disarmament Agency
label: 6511 Abolition of United States Arms Control and Disarmament Agency
text: The United States Arms Control and Disarmament Agency is abolished.
notes: Effective Date, subdiv. A, title XII, § 1201, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–277, div. G112 Stat. 2681–767Oct. 21, 1998“This title [see Tables for classification], and the amendments made by this title, shall take effect on the earlier of—“(1); orApril 1, 1999“(2)the date of abolition [] of the United States Arms Control and Disarmament Agency pursuant to the reorganization plan described in section 1601 [].”Apr. 1, 199922 U.S.C. 6601
